CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breached
CRITICAL.condition: Pipeline has not run in more than 24 hours
CRITICAL.message: The data pipeline has not run in more than 24 hours, leading to stale data.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the pipeline failure immediately.

CRITICAL.name: quality_threshold_breached
CRITICAL.message: Data quality has fallen below the 99.9% threshold, leading to potential erroneous financial insights.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the data quality issue immediately.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the bounds of 17 to 25
CRITICAL.message: The row count is outside the acceptable bounds of 17 to 25, impacting data completeness.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve the row count anomaly immediately.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.condition: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit
WARNING.message: The pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit, which may delay the dashboard update.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor the pipeline runtime and take action if it exceeds the limit.

WARNING.name: quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: Data quality is slightly below the 99.9% threshold, which may lead to minor erroneous financial insights.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the data quality issue and take corrective action if necessary.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_rate_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: One merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%, indicating a potential issue.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the merchant's failure rate and take corrective action if necessary.

INFO.name: new_payment_method_detected
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data.
INFO.recommended_action: Log the new payment method for future reference.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25
INFO.message: The daily row count is near the bounds of 17 to 25, but within acceptable limits.
INFO.recommended_action: Log the row count for future reference.
